name: Dog Fest Chicken Strips On Chewy Stick 90G
description: Simple and Classic. A long-lasting chewy rawhide stick is covered with strips of chicken breast fillet. Cooked in the oven to become one of the most favorite dog treats. Composition: chicken, rawhide, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 65, crude fat 3.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 3.5, moisture 18.
